leadText: Ceaseless Edge (Japanese: ひけん・ちえなみ Secret Sword - Thousand Waves) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Hisuian Samurott.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Ceaseless Edge inflicts damage and has an increased critical-hit ratio. It also leaves the target with splinters for 4 turns ( Strong Style ), 2 turns ( Agile Style ), or 3 turns (otherwise). Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 15 Agile Strong Power 65 50 80 Accuracy 90% 90% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Turns 3 2 4 Crit. stage +1 +1 +2 ? ? Leaves splinters on the target High critical hit ratio Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Ceaseless Edge inflicts damage and sets up one layer of Spikes on the opposing side of the field. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%. It does not have an increased critical-hit ratio.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user slashes its shell blade at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Shell splinters left behind by this attack will continue to damage the target for several turns. S V The user slashes its shell blade at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes. * The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes. *
